{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/anthropic-vacancies/hermes-comparison/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "hermes-comparison"
tags:
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. hermes-comparison

_Файлов:_ 14

h2. Содержание

* [[00-question-what-is-hermes|00-question-what-is-hermes.md]] — 
* [[01-similarity-1-composite-skills|01-similarity-1-composite-skills.md]] — 
* [[02-similarity-2-persistent-memory|02-similarity-2-persistent-memory.md]] — 
* [[03-similarity-3-mcp-support|03-similarity-3-mcp-support.md]] — 
* [[04-similarity-4-multi-platform|04-similarity-4-multi-platform.md]] — 
* [[05-similarity-5-self-hosting-privacy|05-similarity-5-self-hosting-privacy.md]] — 
* [[06-difference-1-structured-substrate-missing|06-difference-1-structured-substrate-missing.md]] — 
* [[07-difference-2-domain-specialization|07-difference-2-domain-specialization.md]] — 
* [[08-difference-3-federation-missing|08-difference-3-federation-missing.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[09-difference-4-institutional-vision|09-difference-4-institutional-vision.md]] — 
* [[10-difference-5-tool-vs-mission-drift|10-difference-5-tool-vs-mission-drift.md]] — 
* [[11-pluses-of-hermes|11-pluses-of-hermes.md]] — 
* [[12-minuses-of-hermes|12-minuses-of-hermes.md]] — 
* [[13-reprioritization|13-reprioritization.md]] — > [!TIP]



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[README]] (сходство 0.19)
* [[09-difference-4-institutional-vision]] (сходство 0.18)
* [[03-similarity-3-mcp-support]] (сходство 0.17)
